codeReview.summary: Repository list/list_limit now route nested-ref models through raw-row decoding plus hydration, and the added integration coverage exercises mixed Vec persistence, FK-array raw storage, and eager hydration across save/get/list/list_limit. I did not find a feature-scoped correctness issue in the reviewed diff.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker could not follow the required GitNexus impact/detect_changes procedure because the documented commands were unavailable in this Windows worker environment, and had to fall back to git diff plus manual inspection.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: worker-transcripts.jsonl skeleton and handoff.skillFeedback show an attempted gitnexus_impact --help, followed by a recorded deviation stating that gitnexus_impact / gitnexus_detect_changes were not available as runnable commands.

summary: Reviewed commit 5f01f139 for nested-store-runtime-vectors-and-collections. The runtime change correctly adds raw-row decode/hydration for nested-ref models in list/list_limit, and the regression test covers mixed Vec reuse/create behavior, RecordId-array storage, and eager hydration for direct, optional, and vector nested references. No blocking or non-blocking code issues were identified in scope.
